This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] The toggle event is still fired if the popover is removed during focus/blur
  assert_array_equals: lengths differ, expected array ["beforetoggle closed -> open", "button blur", "beforetoggle open -> closed", "focusElement focus", "toggle open -> closed", "toggle closed -> open"] length 6, got ["beforetoggle closed -> open", "button blur", "focusElement focus", "toggle closed -> open"] length 4
Harness: the test ran to completion.
